message: Your KYC has not been updated. Your UPI account will be blocked in 24 hours. Update now: http://kyc-update.in/verify
Aapka bijli connection aaj raat 9 baje band ho jayega. Unpaid bill ke karan. Turant is number pe call karein: 9876543210
Dear customer, aapka SBI account suspicious activity ki wajah se block ho gaya hai. Unblock karne ke liye yahan click karein: http://sbi-verify.co.in
A refund of Rs 1,842 is pending in your account from Flipkart. Enter your UPI PIN on this link to receive: http://flipkart-refund.xyz
Urgent hiring! Work from home. Earn Rs 40,000/month. No experience needed. Simple data entry. Pay Rs 299 registration fee to get started.
Sarkari naukri guaranteed! Railway department mein 500 vacancies hain. Selection pakka. Abhi Rs 500 registration fee bhejein aur form submit karein.
Hi, I am Priya from Amazon HR. You have been shortlisted for a Work From Home role. Salary: Rs 55,000/month. Kindly pay Rs 1,000 security deposit to confirm your seat.
Simple mobile task job. Like YouTube videos and earn Rs 600 per hour. Work from anywhere. No experience. First task is free. Pay Rs 200 to unlock premium tasks.
Congratulations! Aapne hamare Diwali lucky draw mein Rs 10 lakh jeete hain! Prize claim karne ke liye abhi call karein: 8899XXXXXX. Offer sirf 24 ghante tak valid hai.
You have won an iPhone 15 Pro in our annual lucky draw. Your number was randomly selected. To claim your prize, pay Rs 500 shipping charges to: UPI ID fraud@ybl
KBC lottery: Aapka number select hua hai aur aap Rs 25 lakh jeete hain. Prize release karne ke liye Rs 2,000 processing fee bhejein. Amitabh Bachchan ka special show.
This is HDFC Bank customer care. Your account has been temporarily blocked due to suspicious activity. Please share the OTP we just sent to restore full access immediately.
Aapka credit card block ho gaya hai ek suspicious transaction ki wajah se. Account reactivate karne ke liye turant call karein: 1800-XXX-0000. 2 ghante mein card permanently band ho jayega.
RBI ki taraf se notice: Aapke account mein illegal transactions detect hui hain. Rs 5,000 penalty bhejein warna aapke khilaf legal case file hoga. Turant response karein.
Join our elite trading group! Guaranteed 200% returns in 30 days. 500 members have already profited. Expert crypto trader. Send Rs 2,000 to join. Limited slots remaining.
Hey, are we still meeting at 7? I might be about 10 minutes late. Traffic on the highway.
Bhai aaj kya plan hai? Movie dekhne chalein kya? Pathaan aa gayi hai theatre mein.
Mummy, main kal ghar aa raha hoon. Khana mat banana, main bahar se kuch le aaunga. Raat ko 9 baje pahunch jaunga.
Happy birthday! Hope you have a wonderful day. Let's plan something for the weekend to celebrate.
Yaar exam ki preparation kaisi chal rahi hai? Koi notes chahiye toh bata, mere paas microeconomics ke notes hain.
Your OTP for PhonePe transaction is 634821. Valid for 10 minutes. Do not share this OTP with anyone.
Your Uber ride is arriving in 3 minutes. Driver: Ramesh Kumar. Vehicle: Swift Dzire, KA05AB1234. You can track in the app.
Zomato: Aapka order confirm ho gaya! Estimated delivery 30-40 minutes. Koi problem ho toh app mein track karein ya humse contact karein.
Amazon: Your package (Order #402-XXXXXX) has been shipped and is on its way. Expected delivery: tomorrow by 8 PM.
IRCTC: Aapki booking confirm ho gayi hai. PNR: 123-4567890. Train: Rajdhani Express. Yatra ki shubhkamnayein!
Hi, this is Dr. Sharma's clinic calling. Your appointment is confirmed for tomorrow at 11 AM. Please arrive 10 minutes early.
Sir, aaj ki meeting ka time change hua hai. Ab 3 baje hogi instead of 2. Please confirm kar dena.
Your order at Myntra has been successfully cancelled as requested. Refund of Rs 1,299 will reflect in your account within 5-7 business days.
Kal ka lecture subah 10 baje hai. Late mat aana, professor attendance ke liye strict hain. Notes bhi saath laana.
Reminder: Your electricity bill of Rs 1,240 is due on the 15th. You can pay via the BESCOM mobile app, website, or any authorised payment centre.
